compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as additional benefit; company bonus or sales commissions/bonuses also referenced

green_flags: Multiple positions available, suggesting active hiring pipeline
Hybrid work with up to 50% telecommuting permitted
Clear minimum requirements listed with explicit encouragement to apply if met
Equity and benefits (401k, medical/dental/vision) explicitly listed
Well-defined product scope (named products: Stripe Managed Payments, Stripe Capital, fiat-to-crypto onramp)
red_flags: JD body appears to repeat several responsibilities twice (likely copy-paste artifact from internal template), which may indicate a hastily assembled posting
No city or office location named for this role despite partial on-site requirement, making office location unclear
#LI-DNI tag indicates this role is not intended for LinkedIn distribution, which may limit candidate visibility
Wide compensation band ($62K spread) provides little signal on expected level without more context
